examples:
!file file=9acb44549b41563697bb490144ec6258 using-brand="Palo Alto Minemeld"
War Room Output
7. Get domain indicator
Retrieves all occurrences of the specified domain, including the context in which it is found.
For this command to succeed, the miner (associated with the domain indicator) has to be on a Cortex XSOAR block list or allow list.
Base Command
domain
Input
name: domain

outputs.description: The Indicator DBotScore.Type The Indicator type
outputs.name: DBotScore.Indicator

outputs.description: The DBot score vendor DBotScore.Score The DBot score
outputs.name: DBotScore.Vendor

outputs.description: For malicious domains, the vendor that defined the domain as malicious Domain.Malicious.Description For malicious domains, the reason that the vendor defined the domain as malicious
outputs.name: Domain.Malicious.Vendor

outputs.description: Domain name (value) Domain.MineMeld.Indicators Entire indicator object
outputs.name: Domain.Name

outputs.description: Entire indicator object MineMeld.Indicators.indicator Indicator value
outputs.name: MineMeld.Indicators

outputs.description: Miner of the indicator MineMeld.Indicators.type Indicator type
outputs.name: MineMeld.Indicators.miner

outputs.description: Indicator comment MineMeld.Miner Entire miner object
outputs.name: MineMeld.Indicators.comment
